name: Butterfly Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe basic pizza dough (see above recipe)
3 cups grated mozzarella, cheddar and/or Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475 degrees F.
2. Grease a large flat baking sheet with olive oil.
3. Separate one-third of the dough and set aside. On a greased baking sheet shape the remaining two-thirds of the dough into a butterfly with two wings. Roll the reserved piece of dough into a "snake" and position it in the center of the two wings as the body. Pull some of the body dough up to shape into a head and pull some of the body dough down for a tail.
4. Spread sauce over the wings. Sprinkle with cheese and decorate with toppings of choice.
5. Bake the pizza on the middle rack of the oven for 20 to 30 minutes until crust is golden brown and cheese is bubbly. Serve warm.
As an alternative, the dough can be divided into four pieces and then shaped into a bug or creature of choice, such as spider with legs, ladybug, dragonfly, snake, etc.
